descriptionText: Introducing the 2008 Beneteau 46, a yacht that perfectly marries advanced sailing technology with luxurious comfort, ready for its new owner. This vessel stands out on the water, boasting meticulous maintenance and a suite of features that ensure both performance and pleasure during extended voyages. Here’s a refined blend of its descriptive and technical highlights:Power and Performance:Engine: Yanmar 4JH4E, 75HP Diesel EngineEngine Hours: 2,200Propulsion: Fixed propeller with shaft drive, optimizing efficiency and power.Key Equipment:Generator: Onan 5.5 KWA, ensuring power reliability for all onboard systems.Dinghy: Zodiac 2.30m with a fiber base, powered by a Yamaha 5HP 2-stroke outboard engine (includes engine bracket).Air Conditioning and Heating: Fully equipped for comfort in all climates.Water Maker: Aqua Prime, 100 liters/hour, extending self-sufficiency at sea.Navigation and Communication:Raymarine 55E Radio: For clear and reliable communication.Chartplotter: Raymarine E80 GPS-Radar combo, simplifying navigation.Autopilot System: For ease of sailing during solo or crewed journeys.Additional: Compass, radar, GPS, TriData, and satellite communications ensure all-round safety.Entertainment:Audio-Video: DVX player, Sony MEX-DV1000 with marine speakers for high-quality sound.Sailing Gear:Winches: 4 electric winches, aiding in effortless sail management. Energy Management:Batteries: One engine battery and four service batteries.Bow Thruster: Forward unit, aiding in precise maneuverability.Utilities: Battery charger, electric and manual bilge pumps, hot water unit.Accommodation and Comfort:Living Quarters: 3 cabins accommodating 6 people, with a living sofa convertible to an extra bed for two.Kitchen Amenities: Includes an Electrolux dishwasher for added convenience.Exterior Features: Sprayhood, bimini, cockpit cushions, and a teak foldable passerella, enhancing outdoor enjoyment.Maintenance:Servicing: Underwent annual haul-outs; the last engine service was completed on 02.05.2023.Designed for discerning sailors who value both the thrill of sailing and the solace of the sea, the Beneteau Oceanis 46 For Sale 2008 promises an unparalleled experience, ready to create unforgettable memories on the water. Whether you're navigating the tranquil bays or embarking on an open ocean adventure, this yacht is prepared to deliver excellence every step of the way.
descriptionHtml:
Introducing the 2008 Beneteau 46, a yacht that perfectly marries advanced sailing technology with luxurious comfort, ready for its new owner. This vessel stands out on the water, boasting meticulous maintenance and a suite of features that ensure both performance and pleasure during extended voyages. Here’s a refined blend of its descriptive and technical highlights:

Power and Performance:

  • Engine: Yanmar 4JH4E, 75HP Diesel Engine
  • Engine Hours: 2,200
  • Propulsion: Fixed propeller with shaft drive, optimizing efficiency and power.

Key Equipment:

  • Generator: Onan 5.5 KWA, ensuring power reliability for all onboard systems.
  • Dinghy: Zodiac 2.30m with a fiber base, powered by a Yamaha 5HP 2-stroke outboard engine (includes engine bracket).
  • Air Conditioning and Heating: Fully equipped for comfort in all climates.
  • Water Maker: Aqua Prime, 100 liters/hour, extending self-sufficiency at sea.

Navigation and Communication:

  • Raymarine 55E Radio: For clear and reliable communication.
  • Chartplotter: Raymarine E80 GPS-Radar combo, simplifying navigation.
  • Autopilot System: For ease of sailing during solo or crewed journeys.
  • Additional: Compass, radar, GPS, TriData, and satellite communications ensure all-round safety.

Entertainment:

  • Audio-Video: DVX player, Sony MEX-DV1000 with marine speakers for high-quality sound.

Sailing Gear:

  • Winches: 4 electric winches, aiding in effortless sail management.

Energy Management:

  • Batteries: One engine battery and four service batteries.
  • Bow Thruster: Forward unit, aiding in precise maneuverability.
  • Utilities: Battery charger, electric and manual bilge pumps, hot water unit.

Accommodation and Comfort:

  • Living Quarters: 3 cabins accommodating 6 people, with a living sofa convertible to an extra bed for two.
  • Kitchen Amenities: Includes an Electrolux dishwasher for added convenience.
  • Exterior Features: Sprayhood, bimini, cockpit cushions, and a teak foldable passerella, enhancing outdoor enjoyment.

Maintenance:

  • Servicing: Underwent annual haul-outs; the last engine service was completed on 02.05.2023.

Designed for discerning sailors who value both the thrill of sailing and the solace of the sea, the Beneteau Oceanis 46 For Sale 2008 promises an unparalleled experience, ready to create unforgettable memories on the water. Whether you're navigating the tranquil bays or embarking on an open ocean adventure, this yacht is prepared to deliver excellence every step of the way.
